description: Decomposes a 3D vector into components along world axes or a reference direction
utility: Show component vectors along x, y, z axes or projected onto a reference vector

alternates.description: Get x, y, or z component vector
Get parallel component along reference vector
Get perpendicular component relative to reference vector

examples.expression: V = vector3d(g, 0, 0, 0, 3, 2, 1); B = vector3d(g, 0, 0, 0, 1, 1, 0); decompose3d(V, B)
V = vector3d(g, 0, 0, 0, 3, 2, 1); B = vector3d(g, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0); decompose3d(V, B, "perp")
